articles.title: Veteran broadcaster and radio anchor Jimmy Gil dies at 79
articles.description: Veteran broadcast journalist and radio anchor Jaime Federico Gil, popularly known as Jimmy Gil, passed away at the age of 79 on Thursday, June 11. Gil’s demise was mourned by the management of Super Radyo DZBB 594 kHz, the flagship AM radio station of GMA Network, where the late journalist spent much of his career and became one of the respected voices in the industry. articles.title: Land of Arielia piles dragons, pets, and everything else into one big adventure
articles.description: Land of Arielia has a dragon hunt, flying mounts, pet hatching, an open world, idle farms, and a fishing minigame. If you've played anything in the last five years, you've probably done most of this before. That's fine. So has everyone else. The setup involves dragons shaping a continent, then disappearing and leaving treasure behind, which sets off a kingdom-wide scramble to track one down. Whoever finds the legendary Dawn Saint Dragon gets crowned Adventure King. With a prize like that, you know thousands of adventurers will be drawn to the same map. You're one of them too. Off you go now. ... [ MORE ]
